data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the required SLA definitions and mechanisms.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to SLA breach detection and compensation. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete SLA definitions or mechanisms that would confirm their existence or coverage. The linked use case mentions the need for SLA definitions but lacks specific data or endpoints to validate this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No concrete SLA definitions (arrival windows, max wait, completion windows) provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify SLA definitions and breach detection mechanisms.
